title: HH Carrier Visor
shortDescription: Polycarbonate visor & ABS brow guard. Universal face shield compatible with most industrial safety hard hats/helmets. Provides face protection against liquid splash, medium impact particulates, molten metal & resistance to hot solids

features: Universal face shield compatible with most industrial safety hard hats/helmets
